summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Aira card management system. Fixed critical backend bug in history endpoint. All core functionality verified: each card displays independent data (history, cashback, transactions, freeze state). The original issue where all cards showed the same content is now RESOLVED.

fixed_bugs.issue: Parameter name 'range' was shadowing built-in range() function causing 'str object is not callable' error
fixed_bugs.impact: History chart was completely broken for all cards and all time ranges

passed_tests: Backend: All 32 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: GET /api/cards - returns 3 cards with correct data
Backend: GET /api/cards/{card_id} - returns individual card details
Backend: GET /api/cards/{card_id}/transactions - returns unique transactions per card for all ranges (hoy, semana, personaliza)
Backend: GET /api/cards/{card_id}/history - returns unique history data per card for all ranges
Backend: GET /api/cards/{card_id}/documents - returns documents per card
Backend: PATCH /api/cards/{card_id}/freeze - freeze/unfreeze works independently per card
Frontend: Page loads successfully without errors
Frontend: Yellow sidebar displays with all navigation items
Frontend: 3 cards visible (debit $66,603, credit $2,500.50, virtual $80.00)
Frontend: First card selected by default with visual ring indicator
Frontend: Card selection changes display independent data - CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED
Frontend: Card 1 shows cashback $125.50 with unique history chart
Frontend: Card 2 shows cashback $45.25 with unique history chart
Frontend: Card 3 shows cashback $2.10 with unique history chart
Frontend: History chart updates when switching between cards
Frontend: Tabs (Hoy, Semana, Personaliza) change chart data correctly
Frontend: Freeze toggle works independently per card
Frontend: Freezing one card does not affect other cards
Frontend: 'Congelada' badge appears only on frozen card
Frontend: All 4 action buttons present (Datos de tarjeta, Movimientos, Documentos de tarjeta, Ver más)
Frontend: Transactions list updates per selected card
Design: Yellow/turquoise color scheme implemented correctly
Design: Card gradients follow design guidelines
Design: Proper spacing and layout
Design: Visual selection indicator (ring) works correctly
